en: Then Job answered and said:
zh: 約伯回答說：

en: "How long will you torment me and break me in pieces with words?
zh: “你們叫我受苦要到幾時呢？ 用話壓碎我要到幾時呢？

en: These ten times you have cast reproach upon me; are you not ashamed to wrong me?
zh: 你們已經十次侮辱我， 你們苛刻地對我，也不覺得羞恥。

en: And even if it be true that I have erred, my error remains with myself.
zh: 即使我真的有過錯， 由我承擔好了。

en: If indeed you magnify yourselves against me and make my disgrace an argument against me,
zh: 你們若真的妄自尊大攻擊我， 用我的羞辱來證明我的不是，

en: know then that God has put me in the wrong and closed his net about me.
zh: 那麼，就知道是 神顛倒我的案件， 用他的網圈住我。

en: Behold, I cry out, 'Violence!' but I am not answered; I call for help, but there is no justice.
zh: 我呼叫‘強暴！’卻沒有回答； 我呼求，卻得不到公斷。

en: He has walled up my way, so that I cannot pass, and he has set darkness upon my paths.
zh: 神用籬笆攔阻我的道路，使我不能經過； 他又使黑暗籠罩我的路。

en: He has stripped from me my glory and taken the crown from my head.
zh: 他從我身上剝去我的榮耀， 又挪去我頭上的冠冕。

en: He breaks me down on every side, and I am gone, and my hope has he pulled up like a tree.
zh: 他四面拆毀我，我就離世， 他又把我這指望如樹枝一樣拔出來。

en: He has kindled his wrath against me and counts me as his adversary.
zh: 他的怒氣向我發作， 把我看作他的敵人；

en: His troops come on together; they have cast up their siege ramp against me and encamp around my tent.
zh: 他的軍隊一起上來， 他們建築高的斜道攻擊我 ，在我的帳棚周圍安營。

en: "He has put my brothers far from me, and those who knew me are wholly estranged from me.
zh: 他使我的族人遠離我， 使我熟悉的人完全與我疏遠。

en: My relatives have failed me, my close friends have forgotten me.
zh: 我的親戚離棄我， 我的朋友忘記我；

en: The guests in my house and my maidservants count me as a stranger; I have become a foreigner in their eyes.
zh: 在我家中寄居的和我的婢女，都把我當作外人， 我在他們的眼中是個外族人。

en: I call to my servant, but he gives me no answer; I must plead with him with my mouth for mercy.
zh: 我呼喚僕人，他不回答， 我得用口哀求他。

en: My breath is strange to my wife, and I am a stench to the children of my own mother.
zh: 妻子厭惡我的氣息， 同胞兄弟也厭棄我，

en: Even young children despise me; when I rise they talk against me.
zh: 連小孩子也藐視我， 我一起來，他們就譏笑我；

en: All my intimate friends abhor me, and those whom I loved have turned against me.
zh: 我所有的密友都憎惡我， 我所愛的人也向我反臉。

en: My bones stick to my skin and to my flesh, and I have escaped by the skin of my teeth.
zh: 我的骨頭緊貼著皮肉， 我只剩牙皮逃過大難。

en: Have mercy on me, have mercy on me, O you my friends, for the hand of God has touched me!
zh: 我的朋友啊！求你們憐憫我，憐憫我吧！ 因為 神的手擊打了我。

en: Why do you, like God, pursue me? Why are you not satisfied with my flesh?
zh: 你們為甚麼有如 神那樣逼迫我？ 還不因吃我的肉感到滿足嗎？

en: "Oh that my words were written! Oh that they were inscribed in a book!
zh: 但願我的話現在都寫下， 都刻在書簡上，

en: Oh that with an iron pen and lead they were engraved in the rock forever!
zh: 用鐵筆又用鉛， 永遠刻在磐石上。

en: For I know that my Redeemer lives, and at the last he will stand upon the earth.
zh: 我知道我的救贖主活著， 最後他必在地上興起 。

en: And after my skin has been thus destroyed, yet in my flesh I shall see God,
zh: 我的皮肉遭受毀壞以後，這事就要發生， 我必在肉體以外得見 神。

en: whom I shall see for myself, and my eyes shall behold, and not another. My heart faints within me!
zh: 我必見他在我身邊， 我要親眼見他，並非外人， 我的心腸在我裡面渴想極了。

en: If you say, 'How we will pursue him!' and, 'The root of the matter is found in him,'
zh: 你們若說：‘惹事的根既然在他， 我們要怎樣逼迫他呢？’

en: be afraid of the sword, for wrath brings the punishment of the sword, that you may know there is a judgment."
zh: 你們就當懼怕刀劍， 因為這些罪孽帶來刀劍的懲罰， 好使你們知道有審判。”
